paragraphs: I'm a software developer and applied AI engineer with 4+ years building RAG pipelines, LLM-powered APIs, and distributed data systems across Amazon, Altice USA, and NGA Group. I care about the unglamorous parts that make AI actually work in production — chunking strategy, embedding selection, reranking, and rigorous evaluation (faithfulness, retrieval precision, answer relevance).

That focus shows up in the numbers: end-to-end RAG architectures with LangChain, OpenAI APIs, Pinecone, and FAISS that moved answer accuracy from 62% to 88%, cut ad-hoc analyst requests by 35%, and automated ~60% of inbound support tickets. Underneath sits a strong backend foundation in Python, Flask, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, AWS, and GCP.
